# NOT real Bible content. Verse numbers must align with the haw fixture
# at code/tests/fixtures/bible/haw/GEN_1.txt. See issue #16.
#
# Format: <verse_no>: <text>
1: This is a marker for the writer's test.
2: The Hawaiian language is a beautiful tongue.
3: This is shown in the test document.
4: Every verse of this document is short.
5: At the end, the test is finished.
